metrics.label: Click-Through Rate
metrics.description: Window CTR (clicks / impressions × 100). Earliest creative-quality signal. Benchmark (Pengwing 2026): avg 0.9–1.5%, good 1.5–2.5%, below-avg <0.7%. Tune per account/audience temperature.

warning.title: Test new ad hooks
warning.description: CTR is below the 1.5% healthy line. Launch 2–3 creative variants with stronger first-frame hooks and clearer value propositions.

critical.title: Refresh creatives immediately
critical.description: CTR is below 1.0%. Pause the weakest ads and replace visuals and headlines this week; check for creative fatigue (rising frequency + falling CTR).

critical.title: Review placements
critical.description: Exclude underperforming placements and ensure creative aspect ratios match Feed/Reels/Stories.

metrics.label: Link Click-Through Rate
metrics.description: Outbound link clicks / impressions × 100. Cleaner intent signal than all-CTR. Benchmark: avg 0.5–1.2%. Optimise conversion campaigns on this, not all-CTR.

warning.title: Clarify destination and CTA
warning.description: Link CTR is soft while engagement may be fine. Make the destination value explicit in copy and test a more direct CTA button.

critical.title: Close the intent gap
critical.description: Very low link CTR on a conversion goal. Align creative promise with the offer and verify the landing page loads fast on mobile.

metrics.label: Conversion Rate
metrics.description: Conversions / link clicks × 100. Post-click health (landing page, offer, checkout). Benchmark (Pengwing 2026): avg 1–3%, good 3–5%, below-avg <1%.

warning.title: Audit landing page
warning.description: CVR is below the healthy band with traffic arriving. Check page speed, mobile UX, and ad-to-page message match (scent).

critical.title: Remove checkout friction
critical.description: CVR critically low. Enable guest checkout and wallets, surface all costs early, and confirm inventory/pricing are correct.

metrics.label: Return on Ad Spend
metrics.description: Purchase revenue / spend. Factor-invariant ratio. Benchmark (Pengwing 2026): ecommerce 2–4x typical, 4x+ strong; high-AOV 1.5–3x. Compare against break-even ROAS (= 1 / margin).

warning.title: Lift average order value
warning.description: ROAS below target. Add bundles, upsells, and free-shipping thresholds to raise AOV without increasing cost; validate against blended MER.

critical.title: Restructure or pause
critical.description: ROAS below 1.0 — spend exceeds returned revenue. Pause or restructure the worst ad sets and fix the dominant cost driver (CPC/CPM/CVR). Check for tracking loss if MER is stable.

metrics.label: Frequency
metrics.description: Impressions / reach in the window. Saturation/fatigue indicator. Benchmark (Good Morning): cold 2.5–3.5, warm 4–6; fatigue line ~3–4 for cold audiences.

warning.title: Expand audience
warning.description: Frequency exceeded 4. Add lookalike or broad segments to reduce overlap fatigue, and rotate in fresh creative.

critical.title: Refresh creatives and cap frequency
critical.description: Frequency exceeded 6. Introduce new creatives, exclude recent converters, and set a frequency cap (e.g. 3 per 7 days) where the objective allows.

metrics.label: Cost Per Mille
metrics.description: Spend / impressions × 1000. Auction-cost signal; read with CTR/CVR. Pengwing 2026 (GBP): broad £6–10, typical £10–18, competitive £18–35+. Thresholds below are representative major-currency defaults — tune per account currency.

warning.title: Review bid strategy and relevance
warning.description: CPM is elevated. Improve relevance (creative quality/engagement) to lower delivery cost and shift budget to better-performing ad sets.

critical.title: Reduce auction pressure
critical.description: CPM critically high. Broaden placements/audience for cheaper inventory; if the spike is seasonal (Q4), protect ROAS via AOV rather than cutting converting creative.

metrics.label: Cost Per Click
metrics.description: Spend / clicks. Derived from CPM and CTR (CPC = CPM / (CTR×10)). Pengwing 2026 (GBP): avg £0.80–1.80, competitive £2.00–4.00+. Fix CTR or CPM rather than CPC directly. Tune to account currency.

warning.title: Improve CTR to lower CPC
warning.description: CPC drifting high. The fastest lever is a stronger hook to raise CTR; also check whether CPM (auction) is the real driver.

critical.title: Broaden audience and refresh creative
critical.description: CPC very high with no conversion offset. Broaden targeting to cut CPM and refresh creative to lift relevance and CTR.

metrics.label: Cost Per Messaging Conversation
metrics.description: Spend / messaging conversations started. Adlytic's Phase-1 primary KPI. Count exactly one canonical 'conversation started' event — never sum overlapping messaging types. Prefer the per-account relative baseline (CostPerMessageEngine) over the static defaults below.

warning.title: Optimize message funnel
warning.description: Cost per conversation above target. Tighten audience to responders, test click-to-message copy, and refine the automated greeting/qualifier.

critical.title: Pause bleeding ad sets
critical.description: Cost per conversation critically high. Pause ad sets above ~2× account median and reallocate to winners; refresh creative if frequency is climbing.

metrics.label: Hook Rate (Thumbstop)
metrics.description: 3-second video plays / impressions × 100. Strongest early signal for short-form video. Benchmark (Ryze 2026): strong >25%, acceptable 15–25%, weak <15%.

warning.title: Test new opening 3 seconds
warning.description: Hook rate below 20%. Lead with motion, a face, or a bold claim in the first second; remove any intro/branding before the hook.

critical.title: Rework hook before spending more
critical.description: Hook rate below 15%. The opening fails to stop the scroll — do not scale spend until a new hook tests above 20%.

metrics.label: Hold Rate
metrics.description: Sustained viewers after the hook (15s/ThruPlay views / 3-second plays × 100). Benchmark (Ryze 2026): strong >25%, acceptable 20–25%.

warning.title: Pay off the hook sooner
warning.description: Hold rate below 20%. Deliver on the hook's promise immediately, tighten pacing, and move the key message/CTA earlier.

critical.title: Shorten and re-pace
critical.description: Hold rate below 15% despite views. Cut dead frames and shorten to 15–30s, which retains best.

metrics.label: ThruPlay Rate
metrics.description: ThruPlays / impressions × 100 (15s or completion). Benchmark (Ryze 2026): typical 18–28%; 15s videos average ~28% vs ~19% for 60s+.

warning.title: Strengthen hook and hold
warning.description: ThruPlay rate below 18%. Hook and hold drive ThruPlay — improve both and trim length to 15–30s.

critical.title: Rebuild the creative
critical.description: ThruPlay rate below 12% on a video goal. Rebuild around a tighter narrative and a faster payoff.

metrics.label: Cost Per ThruPlay
metrics.description: Spend / ThruPlays. Headline cost metric for video-views objectives. Benchmark (Ryze 2026): typical $0.01–$0.10. Use only for awareness/views, never as a conversion proxy.

warning.title: Lift ThruPlay rate
warning.description: Cost per ThruPlay above the typical range. Improve hook/hold to raise ThruPlay rate and broaden placements to cut CPM.

critical.title: Revisit audience and creative fit
critical.description: Cost per ThruPlay well above range. Re-check creative-audience fit and placement quality.

metrics.label: Cart Abandonment Rate
metrics.description: (1 − purchases/add-to-carts) × 100. Late-funnel leakage and the recoverable retargeting audience. Typical ecommerce 65–80%.

warning.title: Retarget abandoners
warning.description: Abandonment above 80%. Launch abandoned-cart retargeting and email with reassurance/urgency; show shipping costs earlier.

critical.title: Fix the checkout
critical.description: Abandonment above 90% — checkout is likely broken or distrusted. Test end-to-end, add guest checkout, wallets, and trust badges.

metrics.label: Fill Rate
metrics.description: Filled ad requests / total ad requests × 100 (publisher/monetization). Healthy >90%. Balance against eCPM — very high fill at low eCPM can underperform.

warning.title: Add demand sources
warning.description: Fill below 90%. Add demand via mediation and review price floors and geo/format mix.

critical.title: Fix mediation configuration
critical.description: Fill below 70% — significant unmonetised inventory. Audit mediation setup and lower over-aggressive price floors.
